sample_titles: Botanic Hearth Batana Oil for Hair Growth & Hair Treatment Oils 4 Fl Oz | Dr Sebi Inspired, 100% Raw & Pure Batana Oil | Scalp & Hair Treatment for Thickness & Strength | All Hair Types
Dersie 100% Pure Batana Oil - Organic Lightweight Leave-In & Pre-Wash Oil for Dry, Damaged, High Porosity Hair - Scalp & Hair Care for Healthier, Longer-Looking Hair - Honduras Sourced (4 fl oz)
Dersie 100% Raw Batana Oil Paste – Unrefined Batana Butter for Hair Growth & Thinning Hair – Deep Scalp & Hair Care for Dry, Damaged, High Porosity & Thin Hair – Authentic Batana from Honduras (4 oz)
MAREE Deep Conditioning Hair Mask for Damaged Hair Treatment - Batana Oil Hair Mask for Hair Growth – Dry Curly Color Refreshing – 10 Fl Oz, Yellow
Batana Oil for Hair Growth, 100% Natural Pure Batana Oil Paste from Dr. Sebi Honduras, Prevents Hair Loss, Enhances Thickness, Organic Raw Scalp Mask for Women & Men (4.05 Oz)
sample_features: Deeply Nourishing: Botanic Hearth Batana Oil is a premium hair and skin treatment that deeply moisturizes, repairs, and promotes growth. This hair oil for hair growth helps stimulate hair follicles to encourage healthy, thicker and faster hair growth.
Versatile Formula: This 118 ml (4 fl oz) oil can be used on hair, skin, nails, and cuticles for intense hydration and nourishment.
Potent Ingredients: Enriched with natural botanicals and essential oils, it helps strengthen and revitalize hair and skin.
Multi-Purpose: Ideal for frizzy or damaged hair, dry skin, brittle nails, and cracked cuticles, providing long-lasting softness and smoothness.
Convenient Application: The lightweight, non-greasy formula absorbs quickly and can be used as a leave-in treatment or added to other products.

【Natural Aroma & Color Variation】: A naturally strong aroma (similar to roasted coffee) and slight color variation — ranging from light green-brown to light yellow-brown — are normal signs of authentic batana oil. Differences between batches may occur while quality, authenticity, and performance remain consistent.

100% Pure Batana Oil: A lightweight, refined form of traditional batana oil with a smooth liquid texture. Ideal for daily scalp care and wash day rituals, suitable as a leave-in or pre-wash oil to help maintain healthier-looking hair.

Support for Dry, Low-Density-Looking Hair: Suitable for hair that appears less full, feels dry, or is prone to breakage due to damage or styling stress. Helps support smoother, fuller-looking, healthier-looking hair over time.
Scalp Conditioning Care: Supports a balanced, conditioned scalp environment through leave-in or pre-wash use, helping hair appear healthier-looking, fuller-looking, and more resilient over time.

Moisture Conditioning Care: Helps maintain moisture balance in dry-feeling hair. Especially loved by textured routines such as 3A–3C and 4A–4C patterns, supporting softer, smoother, and fuller-looking results.
100% Raw Batana Oil for Hair Growth: Authentic, unrefined batana oil from Honduras. Rich paste texture traditionally used to support hair growth and improve the appearance of thinning hair.
For Dry, Damaged & Thinning Hair: Ideal for fragile, high porosity, dry hair prone to breakage. Helps reinforce weak strands, restore moisture, and support thicker, fuller-looking hair.
Deep Scalp & Hair Nourishment: Delivers intensive moisture and conditioning to both scalp and hair, helping strengthen roots and strands for thicker, longer-growing hair from root to ends.
Reduce Breakage & Retain Length: Helps reduce breakage, snapping, and split ends while strengthening strands to support improved length retention over time.

Intensive Weekly Growth Ritual: Designed for use 1–3 times per week, this rich paste melts evenly to deliver deep repair and thickness support. Suitable for fine, thin, thick, curly, straight, and coily hair types.

Deep Conditioning Hair Mask for Dry & Damaged Hair Care – MAREE keratin hair mask batana oil is designed to support hydration, softness, and manageability for dry, damaged, or color-treated hair. Results may vary based on hair type, condition, and application method.

Keratin Hair Treatment with Gentle Repair Support – formulated with keratin (keratina), biotin, batana oil and coconut oil, this hair mask helps smooth frizz and improve the appearance of split ends. Ideal as a conditioning treatment for hair affected by heat styling or coloring.

Hydrating Formula with Collagen, Biotin & Coconut Oil – this nourishing hair conditioning mask with batana oil provides moisture and softness while helping hair feel easier to detangle and style. Suitable for users seeking added hydration without heavy buildup.

Versatile Use for Different Hair Types & Routines – Can be used as a conditioner (2-3 minutes), deep conditioning mask (10 minutes), or intensive treatment (up to 30 minutes). Recommended for dry, damaged, curly, or color-treated hair; not all hair types require long application times.

Thoughtfully Designed Formula & Packaging – Features a noticeable coconut fragrance and a protective dual-layer jar. Twist and lift gently to open the lid. Fragrance strength and results may vary based on personal preference and hair needs.

listing.title: [BRAND] Batana Oil for Hair, 100% Raw Honduras-Sourced Paste, 4 oz | Lab-Tested No-Added-Fragrance Scalp & Deep Conditioning Mask for Dry Damaged Hair, Fuller-Looking Strands
bullets: FULLER-LOOKING HAIR SUPPORT: 100% raw batana oil paste coats dry, damaged strands with omega-rich conditioning care, helping reduce breakage from styling so your hair looks thicker, smoother and stronger.

BALANCED SCALP COMFORT: Single-ingredient batana oil with no added fragrance, mineral oil or silicones melts into the scalp for a 20-minute pre-wash treatment, so you moisturize without unwanted buildup.
LESS MESS ON WASH DAY: A wide-mouth 4 oz jar includes an inner seal and reusable spatula, letting you scoop the rich mask cleanly, warm it in your palms and target edges, ends or scalp without drips.
CONFIDENCE IN EVERY BATCH: Honduras-sourced batana is third-party lab tested and filled in an ISO 22716 cosmetic GMP facility, giving you traceable, clean hair care for your weekly routine.
CARE FOR ALL TEXTURES: The deep conditioning oil paste suits straight, wavy, curly and 3A-4C coily hair; use 1-3 times weekly to add moisture, soften frizz and support shine from roots to ends.
listing.description:
Bring your wash day back to basics with [BRAND] Batana Oil, a 4 oz raw Honduras-sourced batana paste crafted for dry, damaged and high-porosity hair. This single-ingredient treatment warms between your palms, then spreads over the scalp, edges and ends to deliver deep conditioning moisture where your routine needs it most. Omega-rich emollients help smooth rough cuticles and reduce breakage caused by heat styling, brushing and tight protective styles, so your strands look fuller, softer and shinier.

Unlike lightweight blends that dilute batana with carrier oils, silicones or synthetic perfume, our formula contains only batana oil—no added fragrance, mineral oil, parabens or sulfates. Expect the traditional roasted, earthy aroma and natural green-brown color that can vary by harvest. Each batch is third-party lab tested and filled in an ISO 22716 cosmetic GMP facility, with an inner seal and reusable spatula for cleaner application.

Use as a 20–30 minute pre-wash scalp treatment, a deep conditioning mask under a cap, or a tiny end-sealer before styling. Start with a pea-to-quarter-size amount, then adjust for straight, wavy, curly or 3A–4C coily hair. If you ever need help building your routine, our care team is here to support you.
listing.search_terms: curly coily 3a 4c high porosity pre wash frizz shine edges split ends women men natural moisture breakage support unrefined authentic caribbean ojon textured routine leave in brittle ends
differentiation_notes: Adds trust with third-party lab testing and ISO 22716 cosmetic GMP production standards.
Solves messy application concerns with a wide-mouth jar, inner seal and reusable spatula.
Sets realistic expectations for natural aroma and harvest-based color variation.
Uses compliant fuller-looking and breakage-support language instead of hair-loss cure claims.
Gives clear routine guidance with 20–30 minute use timing and 1–3 times weekly frequency.

aplus_modules.heading: Revive Dry Hair With Raw Batana
aplus_modules.body: Turn wash day into a nourishing ritual with raw Honduras-sourced batana oil paste. Warm a small amount in your palms, smooth it through dry ends or massage into your scalp, and let the rich conditioning texture help your strands look softer, stronger and fuller from root to tip.
aplus_modules.image_prompt: Photorealistic commercial product photography, warm amber cream and deep green color palette. A woman with healthy textured dark hair applies a rich golden-brown oil paste to her ends in a sunlit bathroom. A plain amber jar with blank cream label and small spatula sits in the foreground. Clean negative space, mobile-first composition, soft natural lighting, premium wellness mood, no visible text, no words, no logos, no copyrighted characters.

aplus_modules.heading: Four Reasons Your Routine Feels Different
aplus_modules.body: Raw Honduras-Sourced: rich paste texture for deep conditioning care. Single Ingredient: no added fragrance, silicones or mineral oil. Lab Tested: added confidence in every batch. Cleaner Application: inner seal and reusable spatula help you scoop, warm and target the areas that need moisture most.
aplus_modules.image_prompt: Photorealistic top-down commercial still life in a warm amber, cream and deep green palette. Arrange a plain amber jar of thick batana paste, reusable spatula, sealed lid, botanical palm fruit elements and glossy oil swirls on a natural stone surface. Grid-like composition with spacious clean negative areas, mobile-first clarity, soft shadows, no visible text, no words, no logos, no copyrighted characters.

aplus_modules.heading: Pure Paste, Not a Thin Blend
aplus_modules.body: Typical hair oils can feel overly diluted, heavily perfumed or slippery with silicones. [BRAND] keeps the routine simple: 100% raw batana oil, no added fragrance, traceable Honduras sourcing and third-party batch testing. You get a richer mask-like texture that stays where you apply it and supports deep moisture without unnecessary fillers.
aplus_modules.image_prompt: Photorealistic side-by-side comparison style product image with no text. On the left, a generic clear runny oil in an unbranded bottle appears slightly blurred and watery. On the right, a premium plain amber jar with thick golden-brown batana paste and spatula is sharp and inviting. Warm amber cream deep green palette, clean negative space, mobile-first readable composition, soft studio lighting, no words, no logos, no copyrighted characters.

aplus_modules.heading: Simple 20-Minute Wash Day Ritual
aplus_modules.body: Scoop a pea-to-quarter-size amount with the spatula, warm between your palms, then apply to scalp, edges or dry ends. Leave on for 20–30 minutes before washing, or use a tiny amount after styling for extra shine. Repeat 1–3 times weekly based on your hair needs.
aplus_modules.image_prompt: Photorealistic commercial beauty tutorial scene without any text or numbers. Show three clean visual moments in one mobile-friendly composition: a hand scooping thick paste with a spatula, hands warming oil between palms, and application near hair ends. Warm amber cream deep green palette, soft bathroom lighting, uncluttered background, large clear subjects, no visible text, no words, no logos, no copyrighted characters.

aplus_modules.heading: Rooted in Traceable Care
aplus_modules.body: We believe effective hair care should be simple, transparent and sensory. That is why our batana oil is sourced with traceability, tested by third-party labs and filled under cosmetic GMP standards. From the earthy natural aroma to the rich paste texture, every jar is designed to support confident, consistent self-care.
aplus_modules.image_prompt: Photorealistic premium brand story still life in consistent warm amber, cream and deep green tones. Display raw palm fruit, a small laboratory glass vial, a plain amber jar of batana paste and a wooden spatula on a natural linen and stone surface. Clean negative space, soft sunrise lighting, earthy trustworthy mood, mobile-first composition with large clear subject, no visible text, no words, no logos, no copyrighted characters.

benchmarks.title: Batana Oil for Hair Growth, 100% Natural Pure Batana Oil Paste from Dr. Sebi Honduras, Prevents Hair Loss, Enhances Thickness, Organic Raw Scalp Mask for Women & Men (4.05 Oz)
features: Miskito Ancestral Cold-Extraction: From Honduran Rainforest to Your Strands, Crafted from 100% Organic Batana Oil Harnesses Nature’s Primal Energy to Transform Hair with Diamond-Like Resilience & Radiance
Hair Growth: Recommended by Dr. Sebi. Our cold-pressed natural oil promotes hair growth, transforming brittle strands into strong, shiny locks while reviving thinning and patchy areas.

Deep Moisturizing: Our hair growth oil continuously releases nutrients and repairs the triple complex damage of dryness, frizz, and split ends. The Batana hair mask simulates the natural lipid barrier of the scalp and locks in moisture in the hair strands.

Suitable for All Hair Types: Batana oil for hair growth works wonders on all hair types. It helps prevent overly dry, rough hair or excessively oily, sticky hair, while reducing static breakage and resisting frizz and clumping.
Convenient to Use: Apply Batana oil to the scalp and massage thoroughly. Let it sit for a while, then rinse off. Enjoy its light coffee aroma.
